operator_lock: Adam 2026-06-21 — Point B is LifeRE Alpha. PASS only when founder success test satisfied.

target.label: LifeRE Alpha
target.point_a: LifeRE stub on production spine — service + routes exist; alpha surface not yet founder-usable
target.point_b: Adam opens LifeRE alpha, sees daily command center, top-3 priorities, and nightly debrief draft — without Cursor
target.founder_success_test: Open /overlay/lifeos-app.html LifeRE path; complete one daily command center cycle; confirm top-3 and debrief visible

doctrine.tools_not_destination: Governance, SSOT, receipts, and pipelines are tools accountable to A→B results — not the destination.
doctrine.chair_job: Ask until founder intent understood; then execute through real paths until Point B is reached or blocked honestly.
